authority: brief section 7 Arm I Stage D + Will's Stage-D GO (Stage C ACCEPTED, the bar cleared; last stage, then the arm's close draft)

depends_on.note: bench code pinned inside the frozen manifest, enforced by require_frozen (rule 1.9); no external executed instrument (struct is representation plumbing; isqrt is stdlib integer arithmetic).

organ: II_d_seam_probe_v1: casts as rounding/truncation ops with exact-Q accounts in the shared ledger shape; the seam fold (Stage-A multiplier weighting across the int/float boundary); the poster bit-route with every stage accounted via the exact residual functional eps(y) = y^2*x - 1 (no irrational ever needed) and an isqrt 1/sqrt(x) enclosure as certified reference.

predictions.PID.1: seam closure: every int->f64 cast row closes Fraction(v) + residue == Fraction(a) exactly; every f64->int trunc row closes v + residue == Fraction(x) exactly with |residue| < 1 and sign(residue) == sign(x) or 0; the pipeline row closes the SEAM FOLD scale*start == final + r3 + r2 + scale*r1 exactly in Q (Stage-A's multiplier-weighted fold, across the seam). Units: rows.
predictions.PID.2: schema indistinguishability: cast_residue entries carry the same common-core key set {kind, discard, weight_log2} as arithmetic entries, with kind drawn from the SAME shared enum, validating under the SAME record schema with no special-case fields; every Stage-D record roundtrips from_json(to_json) intact. Units: entries + records.
predictions.PID.3: the poster, demo-tier: the bit-route fully accounted per stage on every pinned input - the i>>1 shifted-out bit as a Stage-A ledger entry; both bitcasts as zero-discard typed seam events; all five float32 roundings of the Newton step as exact-Q residues; eps(y) = y^2*x - 1 exact at y0 and y1 == pinned; Newton contraction certified |eps(y1)| < |eps(y0)| on every input by exact comparison; y1's gap from the certified isqrt 1/sqrt(x) enclosure (60 bits, exact interval arithmetic) == pinned exact interval; the magic-constant profile (0x5F3759DF vs +-1 neighbors at x = 1.0) == pinned. Demo-tier: exhibits the vocabulary, mints no law. Units: inputs x stages.
predictions.PID.4: refusal honesty: nonfinite and overflow casts refuse TYPED; non-exact-f32 poster inputs refuse TYPED (no silent rounding of the QUESTION); zero refusals on the lawful battery. Units: probes.
predictions.PID.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

referee: exact Q (Fraction) everywhere; integer isqrt for the certified enclosure (facet-A sqrt-atom lineage).
status_move_rules: CL-I5 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PID.1 AND PID.2 AND PID.4 PASS. CL-I6 -> DEMONSTRATED (demo-tier noted) iff PID.3 PASS. Any FAIL: K-I1 halt-until-fixed, chain preserved, STOP, route to Will. On completion: the ARM'S CLOSE DRAFT (atlas pattern; stops at the draft for Will's sign-off).
